Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 5.

Quest Text

Description

Return to Xhargregs Research Station in Zergilin with your findings.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Worthless! This goo isn’t even poisonous. You want a reward for a failure? Fine you can have a nice little reward… yeeees…"
